# Category creation thesis

## When to use

Use when buyers do not know category exists.

## Why it works

Names the new category.

## Mechanism

Language can create mental shelf.

## Required inputs

Manifesto, explainer, comparison to old workflow.

## When not to use

If problem lacks urgency.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Content saves, direct searches, inbound questions.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
